cwes.cwe_desc: The product does not properly anticipate or handle exceptional conditions that rarely occur during normal operation of the product.

The product does not use or incorrectly uses a protection mechanism that provides sufficient defense against directed attacks against the product (missing security headers such as X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Content-Security-Policy).

The product does not properly control the allocation and maintenance of a limited resource, thereby enabling an actor to influence the amount of resources consumed, eventually leading to the exhaustion of available resources.
